name: Brownie Swirl Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease the bottom of a 9-inch Springform pan.
2. Prepare the brownie mix according to package instructions and pour the batter evenly into the prepared pan. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla extract. Mix on medium speed until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Pour the mixture over the brownie layer in the Springform pan.
6. Spoon chocolate chips over the cream cheese mixture and cut through it several times to achieve a marble effect.
7. Bake at 350°F for an additional 35 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill before serving.
9. Garnish with whipped cream, if desired.
